title: Hello World
content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
Quick StartCreate a new post$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing
Run server$ hexo server

More info: Server
Generate static files$ hexo generate

More info: Generating
Deploy to remote sites$ hexo deploy

More info: Deployment
代码示例
#include<bits/stdc++.h>#define ll long long#define int long long#define uit unsigned intusing namespace std;const int N=500,M=3e4+10,INF=2e9+2e8;int n,m,S,T,tot=1,idx=0,head[N],cur[N],d[N],nex[M],W[M],F[M],e[M],dis[M],v[N];bool ins[N],vis[N];deque<int> q;void add(int x,int y,int _f,int _w){	++tot;e[tot]=y;nex[tot]=head[x];head[x]=tot;F[tot]=_f;W[tot]=_w;	++tot;e[tot]=x;nex[tot]=head[y];head[y]=tot;F[tot]=0;W[tot]=-_w;}bool zkw_spfa(){	for(int i=0;i<=T;i++) d[i]=-1,dis[i]=inf,ins[i]=0;	cur[S]=head[S],d[S]=0,dis[S]=0,ins[S]=1;	q.push_back(S);	while(q.size()){		int x=q.front();q.pop_front();		ins[x]=0;		for(int i=head[x];i;i=nex[i]){			int y=e[i];			if(dis[y]>dis[x]+W[i]&&F[i]){				dis[y]=dis[x]+W[i];				cur[y]=head[y];d[y]=d[x]+1;				if(!ins[y]){					ins[y]=1;					if(q.size()&&dis[y]<dis[q.front()]) q.push_front(y);					else q.push_back(y);				}			}		}	}	return dis[T]<INF;}int zkw_FIND(int x,int lt,int &_flow,int &_cost){	if(x==T){/*_cost+=lt*dis[T];*/_flow+=lt;return lt;}	int FLOW=0;	for(int i=cur[x];i&&FLOW<lt;i=nex[i]){		int y=e[i];cur[x]=i;		if(d[y]==d[x]+1&&dis[y]==dis[x]+W[i]&&F[i]){			int t=zkw_FIND(y,min(F[i],lt-FLOW),_flow,_cost);			if(!t) d[y]=-1;			F[i]-=t;F[i^1]+=t;FLOW+=t,_cost+=t*W[i];		}	}	return FLOW;}void zkw(int &_flow,int &_cost){	_flow=_cost=0;	while(zkw_spfa()) while(zkw_FIND(S,INF,_flow,_cost));}signed  main(){	freopen("a.in","r",stdin);	freopen("a.out","w",stdout);	scanf("%lld%lld",&n,&m);	S=1,T=n;	for(int i=1;i<=m;i++){		int x,y;ll a,b;		scanf("%lld%lld%lld%lld",&x,&y,&a,&b);		add(x,y,a,b);	}	ll flow,cost;	zkw(flow,cost);	printf("%lld %lld",flow,cost);/*	scanf("%d",&n);	S=0,T=n+1;	for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&v[i]),idx+=v[i];	idx/=n;	for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){		add(i,i<n?i+1:1,INF,1);		add(i,i>1?i-1:n,INF,1);	}	for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){		if(v[i]>idx) add(S,i,v[i]-idx,0);		else add(i,T,idx-v[i],0);	}	int flow,cost;	zkw(flow,cost);	printf("%d",cost);	*/	return 0;}
